channel.title: mad213_syllabus on FALL 2020-2021

item.title: MAD213 Weekly Schedule
item.description: Dear all, I have set zoom meeting link for MAD213. Check out its detail here Below, you can find detailed weekly schedule of MAD213. ☀️ GERTUNC 📊 Date Topic October 9 Introduction October 16 Basic definitions and concepts October 23 Measures of location and dispersion October 30 Representing data graphically November 6 Distributions November 13 t tests November 20 Midterm 1 November 27 ANOVA December 4 Regression December 11 Correlation December 18 Confidence intervals December 25 Chi square tests January 1 Public Holiday: New Year January 8 Midterm 2
